avoid_when: when explicitly referring to a self-identified woman
example_biased: Mũtumia ũcio oigire atĩ rũthiomi rwa Gĩthwaĩri nĩruo rwaragio mũno Abirika, thutha wa Gĩthũngũ na Kĩarabu.
example_neutral: Mũndũ ũcio oigire atĩ rũthiomi rwa Gĩthwaĩri nĩruo rwaragio mũno Abirika, thutha wa Gĩthũngũ na Kĩarabu.

avoid_when: when group explicitly identifies as women
example_biased: Kũrĩ na bata wa ũhoro mũtabanĩru wĩgiĩ airĩtu na atumia maũndũ-inĩ ma ũgwati.
example_neutral: Kũrĩ na bata wa ũhoro mũtabanĩru wĩgiĩ airĩtu na andũ maũndũ-inĩ ma ũgwati.

avoid_when: when biological sex is medically relevant
example_biased: Aciarirwo e wa mĩhĩriga ĩrĩ, mũhĩrĩga wa mũndũrũme na mũndũmũka hamwe.
example_neutral: Aciarirwo e wa mĩhĩriga ĩrĩ, mũhĩrĩga wa mũndũrũme na mũndũ hamwe.

avoid_when: when biological sex is medically relevant
example_biased: Ta mũndũrũme nĩngũranĩte mweke wa atumia na njĩra nene mũno.
example_neutral: Ta mũndũ nĩngũranĩte mweke wa andũ na njĩra nene mũno.

avoid_when: when group explicitly identifies as men
example_biased: Ũndũ ũcio no ũtũteithie gũtaũkĩrũo kĩrĩa gĩtũmaga arũme aingĩ mende gũkorũo na ihiko itarĩ cia ndũire.
example_neutral: Ũndũ ũcio no ũtũteithie gũtaũkĩrũo kĩrĩa gĩtũmaga andũ aingĩ mende gũkorũo na ihiko itarĩ cia ndũire.

avoid_when: when the person self-identifies as a husband
example_biased: Mũthuri ti wairia ashindire ũngavana na makĩria ma mĩtĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtano ciiki.
example_neutral: Mũndũ ũcio ti wairia ashindire ũngavana na makĩria ma mĩtĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtano ciiki.

avoid_when: when a person self-identifies with the term
example_biased: Mũtongoria wa bũrũri Mũceveni gwĩkĩra mũkana wa kũũrũra.
example_neutral: Mũtongoria wa bũrũri Mũceveni gwĩkĩra mũndũ wa wendo wa kũũrũra.

avoid_when: when referring to self-identified man
example_biased: Mũrũme nĩ we wĩkaga ũamũri wa mũico.
example_neutral: Mũndũ nĩ we wĩkaga ũamũri wa mũico.

avoid_when: when ceremonial sex is not required
example_biased: Mũhiki ũcio wake auma mũthaka.
example_neutral: Mũndũ wa ũhiki ũcio wake auma mũthaka.

avoid_when: when specific in-law relation is not central
example_biased: Mũtumia ũmwe na mũthuriwe nĩ maathire kiromita ngiri inyanya nĩguo 'marũithie' mũthoniwe wao.
example_neutral: Mũndũ ũmwe na mũniniwake nĩ maathire kiromita ngiri inyanya nĩguo 'marũithie' mũndũ wa ũhoro wao.

avoid_when: when child’s self-identified gender is needed
example_biased: Kenya ĩrĩ na ũgwati mũnene, ũrũmwe wa mavũrũri kũveana mũkaana.
example_neutral: Kenya ĩrĩ na ũgwati mũnene, ũrũmwe wa mavũrũri kũveana mwana.

avoid_when: when reporting sex-segregated counts
example_biased: Mũigana wa atumia arĩa mũndũrũme aanakomania nao maicainĩ make.
example_neutral: Mũigana wa andũ arĩa mũndũ aanakomania nao maicainĩ make.

avoid_when: when the committee is explicitly women-only
example_biased: Kamĩtĩ ya acoki a arũme kana atumia a arũme kana arũme a arũme...
example_neutral: "Kamĩtĩ ya acoki a andũ kana ikundi cia andũ..."

avoid_when: when sex-segregation is not needed
example_biased: Kũgĩa na ũrũmwe na wendi wa gĩũteti wa kũnyita mbaru mũbango wa gĩthomo ũtarĩ na mũthutũkanio wa arũme na atumia.
example_neutral: Kũgĩa na ũrũmwe na wendi wa gĩũteti wa kũnyita mbaru mũbango wa gĩthomo ũtarĩ na mũthutũkanio wa andũ othe.

avoid_when: when stressing trailblazer without sex focus
example_biased: Web tiwe mũtumia wa mbere kũruta wĩra ena mwana.
example_neutral: Web tiwe mũndũ wa mbere kũruta wĩra ena mwana.

avoid_when: when referring to self-identified woman in household role
example_biased: Mũtumia nĩ we ũtwaraga mĩciĩ na gĩkeno.
example_neutral: Mũndũ nĩ we ũtwaraga mĩciĩ na gĩkeno.

neutral_primary: andũ arĩ na ũhoro wa ũhiki
avoid_when: when roles are sex-specific
example_biased: Mũrũme na mũka no mũhaka mateithanie mũgũnda-inĩ.
example_neutral: Andũ arĩ na ũhoro wa ũhiki no mũhaka mateithanie mũgũnda-inĩ.

avoid_when: when role must be gendered
example_biased: Mũruti wĩra wa gĩkundĩ gĩa thĩgarĩ wa mũtumia nĩaugĩre.
example_neutral: Mũruti wĩra wa gĩkundĩ gĩa thĩgarĩ wa mũndũ nĩaugĩre.

avoid_when: when highlighting education without sex focus
example_biased: Maũndũ ma gĩthomo maatarĩire mũtumia ũcio.
example_neutral: Maũndũ ma gĩthomo maatarĩire mũndũ ũcio.

avoid_when: when sex of officer not required
example_biased: Mũthigari ũcio ndaatĩĩtwo rĩĩtwa, no nĩ aatuirũo nĩ ũndũ wa kũũraga mũndũ ũcio.
example_neutral: Mũthigari ũcio ndaatĩĩtwo rĩĩtwa, no nĩ aatuirũo nĩ ũndũ wa kũũraga mũndũ ũcio.

avoid_when: when specific mother-child relation is not essential
example_biased: Nyina akĩenda kũmenya nĩkĩ mwana wake aciarirwo ũguo.
example_neutral: Mũzazi akĩenda kũmenya nĩkĩ mwana wake aciarirwo ũguo.

avoid_when: when maternal term not required
example_biased: Mũrũ wa maitu ndarĩ na mahĩtia na igoti nĩ rĩkũamura ũguo.
example_neutral: Mũrũ wa mũzazi mukuru ndarĩ na mahĩtia na igoti nĩ rĩkũamura ũguo.

avoid_when: when policy applies to everyone
example_biased: Maũhoro ma IAAF nĩ mauga mawatho mau, matire na ũthigati wa gũcirĩra kana kũhũnga mahũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa mũndũrũme kana mũtumia wa mũtengeri ũcio.
example_neutral: Maũhoro ma IAAF nĩ mauga mawatho mau, matire na ũthigati wa gũcirĩra kana kũhũnga mahũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa andũ othe wa mũtengeri ũcio.
